title: where did the MP evas get their s2 engines
display_title: where did the MP evas get their s2 engines
wikitext:
[]: where did the MP evas get their s2 engines?             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Apr 24, 2007 2:08 am were they built in a nifty s2 engine factory? salvaged from somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 24, 2007 3:25 am When they salvaged the core from Shamshel they were able to obtain its S2 engine. I imagine they found a way to clone it - or found a way to manufacture the MPEs with S2s in them.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Apr 24, 2007 3:41 am A valid question: my guess is that we know with Eva 04 they were tinkering with making their own S2 Organs.....so this is just that they were able to perfect them. ****But what role exactly did Shamshel's core play? Someone once said Shamshel's core was reused in Eva 04 but I think that's wrong: I think they just reverse engineered it.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 24, 2007 3:45 am S2 is *supposedly* inside the core. They wanted the Core so they could study/use/engineer/whatever the S2 for their own needs.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 24, 2007 8:31 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: S2 is inside the core.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 24, 2007 8:38 am The Eva Monkey wrote: You sir just opened a can of worms. And I'm going to let the sticklers for details sack you mercilessly.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Apr 24, 2007 8:54 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: I mean, when Yui goes bonkers in ep. 19 and starts chowing down on Zeruel's core

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 24, 2007 9:10 am The Eva Monkey wrote: Since when is she shown chowing on the core? About the only recognizable feature seen being chewed on was the "face" for a lack of a better term.

[]:             Quote Post by Ayana-Me » Tue Apr 24, 2007 11:25 am After the NERV branch in Nevada is wiped out during the S2 experiments, doesn't Gendo remark that they still had all the collected data? They probably did for the MP evas what they did for Unit 04, just minus the catastrophic explosion part.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Tue Apr 24, 2007 3:48 pm We discussed the location of the S^2 organ a while back . The thread drifted slightly, but the overall thrust was that indeed, it appears that the S^2 organ is in, or at least takes residence in the core.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Tue Apr 24, 2007 5:59 pm I would imagine they cloned Shamshel's organ and slapped them in the Harpies. Though this seems rather dangerous considering the refirbished one from Shamshel destroyed an entire branch of NERV.

[]:             Quote Post by Big Panda » Tue Apr 24, 2007 9:35 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: Anyway, if the S2 isn't in the core, how do you explain their desire for Shamshel's core as intact as possible? They obviously wanted an S2. They were able to produce Evas with cores - what they needed was an S2. Hence - Shamshel with core intact = S2 for them to use.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 24, 2007 9:43 pm Big Panda wrote: Correct me if I'm wrong, but didn't they say: "Everything is intact, EXCEPT THE CORE" (Not with these words) BTW, Shamshel is the fourth right?

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Apr 24, 2007 9:50 pm They probably did for the MP evas what they did for Unit 04, just minus the catastrophic explosion part.

[]:             Quote Post by InvaderRen » Mon Apr 30, 2007 7:13 pm I was pretty sure that the Eva's cores had been genetically REMOVED for the purpose of not giving them unlimitied power. To give the Harpies the core, they would just have to leave the DNA sequence for it

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Mon Apr 30, 2007 7:32 pm All Evas have cores, this is where the soul resides. We never see EVA-02's or EVA-03's, but we did see EVA-00's proving that it is natural for them to have cores.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Apr 30, 2007 7:42 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: All Evas have cores, this is where the soul resides. We never see EVA-02's or EVA-03's, but we did see EVA-00's proving that it is natural for them to have cores.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Mon Apr 30, 2007 11:21 pm S2 organ is located IN the core, right?

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Wed May 02, 2007 8:05 pm V wrote: S2 organ is located IN the core, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed May 02, 2007 9:37 pm DatDude wrote: Nope its that face thing on most of the angels or at least it was in the one Unit-One ate . . .
summary:
[]: where did the MP evas get their s2 engines?             Quote Post by slothen » Tue Apr 24, 2007 2:08 am were they built in a nifty s2 engine factory? salvaged from somewhere?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue Apr 24, 2007 3:25 am When they salvaged the core from Shamshel they were able to obtain its S2 engine. I imagine they found a way to clone it - or found a way
